queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of having no checking account on credit default probability and its role as a key determinant of default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into how checking account balances between zero and two hundred Deutsche Marks function as credit risk drivers and increase borrower default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical evaluation of the impact of savings account balances below one hundred Deutsche Marks on credit risk drivers and their correlation with heightened default probability.
